brief_html: Returns a list of available players for an arranged team ladder game. Players who are considered available: have no away message on, are mutual friends in the chat environment, or non-friend listed users in the same channel as you.
remarks_html: Returns a list of available players for an arranged team ladder game. Players who are considered available: have no away message on, are mutual friends in the chat environment, or non-friend listed users in the same channel as you.
